title: UserList
description: A paginated list of users sharing the filter. This includes users that are members of the groups or can browse the projects that the filter is shared with.

end-index.description: The index of the last item returned on the page.

max-results.description: The maximum number of results that could be on the page.

size.description: The number of items on the page.

start-index.description: The index of the first item returned on the page.
